examples.title: Hash Function Algorithm
examples.code:
ALGORITHM HashFunction
INPUT: data (any size)
OUTPUT: hashValue (fixed size)

BEGIN
 hashValue = SHA256(data)
 RETURN hashValue
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates a basic hash function using SHA256.

examples.title: Digital Signature Implementation
examples.description: Demonstrates creating and verifying a digital signature using ECDSA
examples.code:
import hashlib
from ecdsa import SigningKey, VerifyingKey

# Generate a private key
private_key = SigningKey.generate(curve=ecdsa.SECP256k1)

# Generate a public key
public_key = private_key.get_verifying_key()

# Data to be signed
message = b'Hello, World!'

# Create a signature
signature = private_key.sign(message)

# Verify the signature
if public_key.verify(signature, message):
 print('Signature is valid')
else:
 print('Signature is invalid')
examples.explanation: This Python code demonstrates creating and verifying a digital signature using ECDSA.
